info.title: FSM API Server
info.description: Task 01 code-first Swagger/OpenAPI bootstrap for api-server

post.description: Mark a thread as read for the current participant
Send a text message or attachment message to a thread
Revoke a pending contact share request before mutual approval
Request bilateral contact sharing for a thread
Approve bilateral contact sharing for a thread
Upload an attachment scoped to a thread
Submit supplier verification package

get.description: Get current supplier profile

post.description: Create supplier profile in draft state

patch.description: Update supplier profile in draft/hold/rejected states

get.description: Get list of requests created by the current requester with optional state filter

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state: draft, open, closed, cancelled

post.description: Create a new request. Requires approved requester business profile.
Requester manually creates or reuses a thread with a supplier for a request

get.description: Get quotes for a request owned by the current requester

post.description: Submit a quote for an open request
Publish a draft request so suppliers can see it. Only request owner can publish.
Close an open request. Only request owner can close.
Cancel a draft or open request. Only request owner can cancel.

get.description: Get the current requester business profile

post.description: Submit requester business profile to enter the approval gate

patch.description: Update the requester business profile in submitted/rejected states

post.description: Withdraw a submitted quote
Select a quote and close the request
Decline a submitted quote
Create a user account with email, password, and role
Authenticate a user and issue JWT tokens
Upload a generic attachment and return storage metadata

get.description: Get detailed information of a specific request. Accessible by request owner or suppliers with access (public open requests or targeted suppliers).

patch.description: Update a request. Only allowed in draft or open state. Only request owner can update.

get.description: List requester or supplier threads
Get thread detail and paged messages
Download a thread attachment file
Returns approved and visible supplier search view entries

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field: updatedAt, monthlyCapacity, moq, companyName

get.description: Returns supplier detail read model
Returns region list with supplier counts
Returns category list with supplier counts
Get latest verification submission status
Get list of requests visible to the supplier (public open requests + targeted requests where supplier is selected)
Get detailed information of a request accessible to the supplier
Get the current supplier's submitted quotes
Get all published notices
Get published notice detail with view count increment
Download a published notice attachment file
Get the currently authenticated user

UpdateRequestRequest.description: Request to update an existing request
